steps.title: Find the lower bound
steps.content:
For every real value of $x$, the exponential part is positive.
$$2^x>0$$
Therefore the numerator is always greater than $5$.
$$6(2^x)+5>5$$

steps.title: Divide by the constant
steps.content:
Dividing by $17$ gives the lower bound for $g(x)$.
$$g(x)>\frac{5}{17}$$

steps.title: Choose the greatest bound
steps.content: As $$x$$ becomes very negative, $$2^x$$ approaches $$0$$, so $$g(x)$$ approaches $$\frac{5}{17}$$ from above but never equals it. The answer is C.
